item.title: Air Canada suspends flights to Cuba because of aviation fuel shortage
item.description: Air Canada said Monday it is suspending service to Cuba because of a shortage of aviation fuel on the island

item.title: Airlines can no longer refuel on island as US blockade deepens energy crisis: Cuba
item.description: Cuban aviation officials have warned airlines of a fuel shortage for refueling on the island

item.title: Outdoor sportswear pioneer Eddie Bauer again files for bankruptcy
item.description: The operator of roughly 180 Eddie Bauer stores across the U.S. and Canada has filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection, blaming declining sales and ...

item.title: What to know about student loan repayment plans and collections
item.description: Itâs been a confusing time for people with student loans

item.title: Wall Street opens lower after markets rally in Asia
item.description: A rally for global stock markets that began in Asia petered out by the time trading got to Wall Street
